name: Profit.co
description: Profit.co offers AI-powered performance management software with 360° feedback, OKR/Goal integration, and real-time dashboards Learn more about Profit.co

reviews.review_title: Great software with super responsive support
reviews.review_description: Before using the software we were practicing OKR in excel sheets,now everything is easy to track measure,everything at hand any time,no need to ask employees to show their progress or the work already done to achieve our giolas,unnecessary hassle and communication already in the past,you just need to login into dashboard to see your team and the company progress.
reviews.review_pros: The software is user friendly,easy to set up.and adjust. The team is constantly working on customizing the soft to meet our expectations.
reviews.review_cons: Some features did not met our expectations,but the product team adjusted them accordingly.

reviews.review_description: Excellent. Lots of value in the application and services for the cost.
reviews.review_pros: Solid software and very good customer service. Shout out to [sensitive content hidden]. and [sensitive content hidden] for their support in getting our Performance Application and Program off the ground!
reviews.review_cons: Some applications have limited configurations, but their support team is open to feedback and improvements.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Difficult to use, I don't find it easy to use; it is hard to handle. Difficult to fill, to see options.
reviews.review_pros: Have my OKRs and my Team in one place. Also other's...Don't have more things to say about Profit CO.
reviews.review_cons: It is challenging to manage, as I can't see the option to copy an OKR from Q3 to Q3. [sensitive content hidden] helped me. I don't have the option to do it, as I'm not a power user

reviews.review_description: Profit.co has been very helpful for our team in managing tasks and assigning responsibilities. It's made our work processes smoother and more efficient
reviews.review_pros: Profit.co simplifies goal setting, task management, and performance tracking with a user-friendly interface and collaborative features. Its flexibility and affordability make it a compelling option for businesses looking to streamline their operations and achieve ambitious goals.
reviews.review_cons: The disadvantage of profit is the high cost for large teams and the overwhelming customization overload

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I really appreciate how structured and intuitive Profit.co makes the OKR process. It helps our teams align objectives, track measurable progress, and connect day-to-day work with strategic priorities.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate how seamlessly Profit.co integrates with analytics and reporting tools. The data visualization and performance dashboards make it easy to monitor progress, identify risks, and make informed decisions. It’s a great tool for connecting strategic objectives with measurable outcomes. Another standout feature is their 24-hour customer support — I’ve never experienced such a high level of responsiveness and professionalism before.
reviews.review_cons: While Profit.co is a powerful OKR management tool, some features can feel a bit complex at firsIt requires time to fully understand how to set it up.

reviews.review_pros: I like the top and bottom up functionality and the continuous system enhancements. The support team investigated and responded in a timely manner and provided us with a solution. Today I would like to appreciate [sensitive content hidden] for his commitment to resolving our issue in record time.
reviews.review_cons: Ability to align individual goals to department OKRs

reviews.review_description: It's great and easy to use. I can control every aspect of the business, I can upload evidences and I can asign tasks to everyone.
reviews.review_pros: The control on the execution of my business strategy. It's easy to use and all the members of my team are aligned.
reviews.review_cons: Some of the KPIs or metrics you have to do the math outside the platform. Some functions are not very intuitive.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Connected via live chat today with [sensitive content hidden]. [sensitive content hidden] shared with me what they were able too via chat but within a few minutes asked if we could jump on a call to troubleshoot. I was so happy to receive this request! [sensitive content hidden] and a colleague, were able to meet with me and met with SUCH PATIENCE! [sensitive content hidden] took the initiative to bring assistance and follow up with confirmation for the resolution! Great initiative! Appreciate the help, [sensitive content hidden]!!!
reviews.review_pros: The details they allow within the platform. it helps us remain organized and up to date on our follow ups for OKRs.
reviews.review_cons: Unable to connect multiple users via the slack integration. Advised they were working on a system for multiple users.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It's an intuitive and easy-to-use tool. I can quickly manage my team's performance. It can also be integrated with other tools.
reviews.review_cons: Everything it's OK. It is a good tool and easy to use. The support team is good too. Thanks .

reviews.review_title: Excellent support given by [sensitive content hidden]
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Fabulous experience, Its a wow experience using the chat option, The executives were couteous and cleared my doubts
reviews.review_pros: Chat Support given by the team, 24/7 connectivity is great, Live support option really helps us and enables us to use Profit.co
reviews.review_cons: Nothing as of now, as i have just started using the platform haven't found anything which is least in liking about profit.co

reviews.review_title: Software in which theory finds immediate and direct application in practice
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It is addictive software. It stimulates a lot of curiosity and poses constant challenges to the understanding of OKR theory and associated practice. The continuous learning aspect is very interesting.In my opinion it is the best product currently on the market when it comes to business strategy, OKRs and the growth of people and teams.
reviews.review_pros: Certainly one of the most engaging aspects is the existence of a cultural basis (that of OKRs) and a theoretical/practical one that lay the foundations for the product's functionality. Everything is done for a specific reason. Every theoretical and practical aspect has a corresponding functionality. This leads to great product flexibility and, above all, the possibility of representing reality 1:1 without compromise.
reviews.review_cons: One can see that there is continuous improvement and development work, but this leads to a mismatch between the documentation and the available version of the product. Not infrequently, one has to mediate and try to understand certain aspects oneself or ask the fantastic support, always ready to answer and explain every aspect.On some functionalities, the UI could be improved.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic!, It has made our lives easier to focus on what is really important.
reviews.review_pros: the ease of creating OKRs and the alignment between the areas with their due follow-ups.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing. All the features are working correctly.

reviews.review_description: Profit's support team is outstanding. I had a few issues where I needed their help late at night or even during the weekends and didn't hesitate to help me. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] just to name a few Profit members that have supported my OKRs journey. Thank you all.
reviews.review_pros: It's a full solution to enhance the company's execution, including OKRs, Performance Review, and task management. Also, Profit recently launched the OKR academy where our team will learn about the best practices Totally customizable to adjust the company's needs
reviews.review_cons: In the beginning, the product is not intuitive and it takes time to set up your quarterly OKRs. However, the Profit team is always available to guide you through it. There are a few features that don't fit our needs but the support team quickly got them and added them as an enhacemnet to be released soon.

reviews.review_title: A very powerful customer support team.
reviews.review_pros: The feedback was extremely prompt, and I truly felt the full support.
reviews.review_cons: Currently, there isn’t one. I understand that unexpected bugs can happen with any product, but having a testing environment would be even better.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: this is for the first time when I use and so amazing about profit.co
reviews.review_pros: its so easy tu use for a work, about task mannagement very helpful to analyze the work being done.
reviews.review_cons: about task mannagement, our and perfomance mannagement.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far so good. The team has always been helpful whenever we reach out for assistance
reviews.review_pros: The Software has a lot of features which gives the user a great experience
reviews.review_cons: Nothing at the moment. I am still getting use to most of the features.

reviews.review_title: Head of Support and Data Analytics
reviews.author_profession: Head of Customer Support and Data Analytics
reviews.review_description: Slow start but excited to see where we go with it after making contact with the support team.
reviews.review_pros: The support team are very helpful. Quick to understand your issue and quick respond with a resolution.
reviews.review_cons: Onboarding and the user interface. Understanding where to start to build out your OKR model.

reviews.review_description: Great experience, so far we have completed almost al implementation milestones.
reviews.review_pros: The implementation team is always available, [sensitive content hidden] for example
reviews.review_cons: Learning curve is kind of hard, so we are still working with deployment team.

reviews.review_title: OKR and Performance Tracking done fashionably!
reviews.review_description: Overall above average, great tool but there are minor improvements needed.
reviews.review_pros: Transparency - shows who is the owner of the task and to which specific track it belongs to. Ton of features on tracking and task visualization. Reminder - never missed a check in! Collaboration - i can add sub owners on tasks.
reviews.review_cons: Interface can be a bit cluttered which leads spending time just to check in.

reviews.review_title: A complete and adaptable OKR software with fantastic support and speedy development cycle
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: When we started working with Profit we realised that we have been setting our OKRs all wrong, and we hadn't aligned them to all the non-quantitative projects that the team were doing. There also wasn't a way to regularly update the leadership with progress, and use the OKRs to manage the team's performance. The introduction of Profit has forced us to think more critically not just about how we set OKRs, but what and how we track the Key Results. This is most effective when there are daily and weekly KR check-ins and alignment with day-to-day tasks.
reviews.review_pros: The most impactful feature is not the completeness of the suite of interconnecting modules for OKRs, tasks, employee engagement and performance management, or how you can combine both top-down cascading of OKRs/KRs with bottom-up alignment. It is also not the ease of setting up the company structure or OKR levels, or the integrations available easing the transition from spreadsheets. No, what I like the most is the level of support from [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and his team to roll this out to our team, constantly listen to user feedback and pushing forward improvements on a weekly basis.
reviews.review_cons: There are always features that can be improved on with a new tool, as different users and companies have different ways of working and with different backgrounds and legacy processes to adopt to. The question should not be what I like the least, but how does Profit respond to user feedback? The answer is that they listen carefully, and often already have a solution on their roadmap ready to be prioritised. No issue is too small, just ask!

reviews.review_pros: This software user friendly The UI/UX used as grateful And Customer service is very helpful
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes, the software needs too long to refresh or be used (may I need to update the PC or network), meanwhile the software is still used by many people. Please profit, do you can update the software? So the software is faster than now

reviews.review_title: Stop looking as this is the only OKR solution you need.
reviews.review_pros: Excellent Product! Excellent Customer Support! The customer support is top-notch with true white glove treatment before and after onboarding. Unlike some vendors that disappear after the transaction, they are attentive and understand what makes good relationships irrespective of the size of the org or users. There are so many pros to this product it's hard to pick. The UI is very intuitive and you can be as complex or as simplistic with your OKRs as your needs grow. I like the fact that if I need to export the data for reporting easily to match company report styles as it is easy to do so you have a lot of flexibility.
reviews.review_cons: Release notes appear absent so I tend to find new features by stumbling upon or the periodic touchpoints with a company rep. I know there are changes to this coming soon but having a product that is continually evolving with additions is not a con but wish I knew when they were released. I know this is being addressed shortly and such a minor concern.

reviews.review_description: Proft.co has created an excellent structure for our startup to measure what matters most and enforced a culture of accountability based on OKRs.
reviews.review_pros: Profit.co provides you with all features you need to run an organization based on OKRs. It is a comprehensive suite with excellent customer support that truly demonstrates listening and caring for the customer's success. Additionally, we have benefited from the amazing OKRs training service they have provided to us.
reviews.review_cons: The tasks management module could be improved in terms of ease of use.

reviews.review_title: The best way of keep up with your companie's OKR
reviews.review_description: Really good experience, the consultants are allways pending to answer questions and to help when required. Congrat to [SENSITIVE CONTENT].
reviews.review_pros: Allows to reflect the OKR team cell working way, Measure its compliance, along with recognizing the teams achievements
reviews.review_cons: Ocassionally it is hard to reflect how the objectives are to be measured, several test will be required to get to the right measure

reviews.review_pros: It always reminds me when I have to do the check-ins. Super easy to see graphics and metrics.
reviews.review_cons: I don't see it as a cons but u need to take your time to undestand the software. When I started working with Profit I thought I would never understand it until I dedicated time to it and started using it for longer.
